teams.name: Sporting CP
teams.description: Sporting CP is one of the three biggest football clubs in Portugal.

teams.name: SL Benfica
teams.description: SL Benfica is one of the most successful Portuguese football clubs.

teams.name: FC Porto
teams.description: FC Porto is one of the most successful and popular clubs in Portugal.

matches.description: Sporting CP secured an important home win against Benfica in a heated Lisbon derby.
A balanced clash ended in a draw, leaving the qualification race open.
Benfica edged Porto in a dramatic five-goal showdown at Estadio da Luz.

news.title: Big Derby in Lisbon
news.content: Sporting CP will face SL Benfica in one of the biggest matches in Portuguese football.

news.title: FC Porto Ready for the Clash
news.content: FC Porto is preparing for an important match against Sporting CP at Estadio do Dragao.
